hero.description: BuilderTek Construction keeps your team on task and on target with intuitive systems to organize, manage, optimize, and enhance your business processes.

trustedLogos.title: Powering Construction Success as a Trusted Salesforce ISV Partner

platformSection.title: The All-in-One Construction Platform
platformSection.description: As an exclusive ISV partner with Salesforce for over 15 years, BuilderTek is built for efficiency, accuracy, and seamless collaboration, so you deliver every project with confidence.

features.title: End-to-End Project Visibility
features.description: Track budgets, schedules, resources, and documents in real time- everything on one reliable platform.

features.title: Accurate Project Execution
features.description: Automate tasks, eliminate duplicate work, and improve decision-making with centralized project insights and built-in reporting.

industriesSection.title: A Powerful Asset For Modern Construction Teams
industriesSection.description: From large-scale commercial developments to routine renovation projects, BuilderTek serves as a strategic asset for construction teams of every size.

tabs.name: Commercial Contractors
tabs.title: Manage Complex, Large-Scale Projects
tabs.subtitle: with precision and complete cost control.

connectedOperations.title: Connected Construction Operations on BuilderTek
connectedOperations.description: BuilderTek, a trusted ISV Salesforce partner for 15 years, brings your field, office, and financial teams into one unified system

items.title: Construction Management
items.desc: From scheduling, to inspections, bidding, tracking, documents, and warranty, organize all construction projects with a single app.

items.title: Financial Management
items.desc: All account management tools in one platform. Monitor budgets, track purchase orders, change orders, manage inventory, expenses, and much more.

items.title: Realty & Closing Management
items.desc: From managing listings to inspections and closings, keep everything well-organized and seamless for the desired outcome.

items.title: CRM For Construction
items.desc: Build a strong reputation through robust communication across teams and clients, from leads to opportunities to account management.

items.title: Resource & Labor Management
items.desc: Automate time cards, crews, and workforce allocation.

featuresSection.title:
Smart Features To Elevate
Construction Workflow
featuresSection.description: Every tool is built for accuracy, real-time updates, and seamless collaboration across your construction team.

items.quote: We've worked with the BuilderTek team for several years, and they've consistently been a helpful and reliable partner. BuilderTek supported us in building a customized project management platform that fits our specific workflows. Their team takes the time to listen, offers practical recommendations, and works collaboratively to find solutions that make sense for our operations.
items.name: Evelynne Bayar

items.quote: We've worked with BuilderTek for a little over a year now, and the team at BuilderTek is great. They take time to understand our business and provide us with good recommendations and customize our projects and workflows to suit our needs. Very responsive and helpful team. Would recommend them as a software provider.
items.name: Brent Stodolak

items.quote: It's been almost 2 years that we've been working together, and we are loving our product. We run 5 different types of construction and you can pretty much customize this thing any way you need it. They are very responsive to questions and issues. If you run any type of construction, this will work for you.
items.name: Nickaletta Muscatello

items.quote: Buildertek has been great for our business. As a Design and Build shop looking to scale our practice, the solution has truly helped us streamline our systems and processes. Mixed in with Salesforce's world-class CRM, you can't go wrong. Don't even waste time with incomplete solutions that provide just the construction management piece.
items.name: Julian Rocco

items.quote: We were in need of a Salesforce solution for our new venture of single-family new construction. BuilderTek checks all of the boxes for a well-rounded Construction CRM. Its out of the box. The BT Team has been supportive in customizing. With Salesforce + BuilderTek, the sky is the limit.
items.name: Sara Unser

items.quote: We switched to BuilderTek 3 years ago as we were trying to piece together a bunch of software. BuilderTek has allowed us to keep all of our field employees in one app.
items.name: Sean Davies

items.quote: BuilderTek is a great application we use for our construction division. User-friendly and many options to fit your business needs. BuilderTek's support and response have a quick turnaround.
items.name: Krista Grazhdani

items.quote: Buildertek has been a great addition to our business.
items.name: Shaun McMurry

items.quote: This is a great database for contractors, customized for their needs. Simple to use, easy to search by customer name, address, or telephone. The team is very responsive when we need changes made and is affordable for a small contractor. Would highly recommend BuilderTek.
items.name: Greg Nelson

items.quote: BuilderTek tools track our construction projects and client satisfaction. I have been so pleased with the type of service we receive from the folks at BuilderTek. They are willing to guide you in the process. We are pleased with our choice of BuilderTek.
items.name: Christyanne Gaspar

items.quote: BuilderTek provides solutions for every aspect of our construction process. It's very intuitive, and the BT HouseTracker team is very responsive and helpful. We would highly recommend this product to anyone in the construction industry.
items.name: Dave Richards

section.title: Build Smarter With
section.description: Get a deep insight to see how BuilderTek helps your team deliver faster, stay organized, and take full control of every project.
